name: (Remake) 50/50 chance of being cucked
description:
She wants to play a little game.

-={=====(:::::💔:::::)=====}=-

Notes:

1. This is a reworking of a bot by Hyun2009 in which they present it as a "possibleNTR" scenario but include nothing to make it possible. In the original, your wife of 4 years wants to prank you with a 50/50 video randomly selected. When the User hits play, the bot was supposed to show either a 'funny video' or a 'cheating video' to her husband {{user}}. What many didn't realize is that the video of her cheating wasn't coded to be fake, which means the game was rigged from the start since she had to have already cheated to make the 'cheating video' that was one of the two options.

2. Yes, I have the definition hidden for now. I don't want to expose the changes just yet. I also don't use anything other than JLLM so I don't turn on Proxy for most bots.

3. I also did some editing to the bot, changed a few aspects of the character, and did some redefining.

4. Turned on proxy, which means you SHOULD see the definition too. I did change some things, but tried to keep it as close to the original as possible. As always, I suck at making bots. So if it's not 'coded properly' then you'll know why. 😂

Anyway, enjoy, don't enjoy, whatever. 🤣

-={=====(:::::💔:::::)=====}=-
